commit_scope: Surface Hostinger deploy build logs in GitHub Actions so failed public roll-forward attempts can be self-healed from exact output.

local_validation.summary: The deploy shell script parses, workflow script references still resolve, and the Hostinger roll-forward step now streams docker compose build/up output while preserving the remote exit status.

ci_validation.details: Pending PR checks for the deploy self-heal patch.

deploy_validation.details: Pending Hostinger auto-deploy rerun and public SHA validation after merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local process validation is complete; CI and deploy proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy for 22cd8d1a30ac708a5d5a7bad3d8b9d4e19cb4179 failed twice in Roll forward VPS after entering docker compose rebuild.
The remote deploy log is only available on the VPS; this machine does not have the Hostinger SSH key, so the workflow must surface the log tail on failure.
The patch changes docker compose build/up from silent file-only redirection to tee output into both the Actions log and the VPS deploy log.
